opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Idaho Comfort HVAC has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers searching after hours cannot book, sending leads directly to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget to capture HVAC service requests automatically.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: Business has 201 Google reviews with a 4.5 rating and no detected CRM or response tools.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal neglect to prospective Boise customers researching HVAC services.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized Google review responses using AI trained on HVAC service context.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no loyalty or recurring service signals on the site.
opportunities.observation: Idaho's harsh winters and hot summers make seasonal tune-ups a missed recurring revenue stream.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal maintenance reminders via SMS and email to convert past customers into memberships.
